name: pypi-age-gate
description: Gate uncached remote PyPI downloads by package version age. TODO: no PyPI repo is wired yet — confirm the real virtual + remote keys before first deploy. Real repoKeys are injected from the PYPI_AGE_GATE_REPO_KEYS repo Variable at deploy time and must be set by hand for a manual jf worker deploy. The remote key MUST be present or the gate never fires.
